records.question: Where is the category where categoryname is Grains/Cereals and it includes the product Singaporean Hokkien Fried Mee with a unit exactly 32 - 1 kg pkgs?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT categories.categoryid FROM categories
JOIN products ON categories.categoryid = products.categoryid
WHERE products.unit = '32 - 1 kg pkgs.' AND products.productname = 'Singaporean Hokkien Fried Mee' AND categories.categoryname = 'Grains/Cereals'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT c.CategoryID
FROM Categories c
JOIN Products p ON c.CategoryID = p.CategoryID
WHERE c.CategoryName = 'Grains/Cereals'
  AND p.ProductName = 'Singaporean Hokkien Fried Mee'
  AND p.Unit = '32 - 1 kg pkgs'

records.question: Which categories include products supplied exactly by Aux joyeux ecclésiastiques?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT categories.categoryid FROM categories
JOIN products ON categories.categoryid = products.categoryid
JOIN suppliers ON products.supplierid = suppliers.supplierid
WHERE suppliers.suppliername = 'Aux joyeux ecclésiastiques'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.CategoryID
FROM Categories c
JOIN Products p ON c.CategoryID = p.CategoryID
JOIN Suppliers s ON p.SupplierID = s.SupplierID
WHERE s.SupplierName = 'Aux joyeux ecclésiastiques'
AND c.CategoryID NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT c2.CategoryID
    FROM Categories c2
    JOIN Products p2 ON c2.CategoryID = p2.CategoryID
    JOIN Suppliers s2 ON p2.SupplierID = s2.SupplierID
    WHERE s2.SupplierName != 'Aux joyeux ecclésiastiques'
)

records.question: Which categories where categoryname is Condiments have products supplied by suppliers located in New Orleans?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT categories.categoryid FROM categories
JOIN products ON categories.categoryid = products.categoryid
JOIN suppliers ON products.supplierid = suppliers.supplierid
WHERE suppliers.city = 'New Orleans' AND categories.categoryname = 'Condiments'
